name: Apple Butter Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the bread ingredients to room temperature.
2. Pour the ingredients into a baking dish or pan in the desired order.
3. Set the oven temperature to 375°F (190°C).
4. Select the appropriate bread setting on your oven, such as "white bread."
5. Place the bread in the oven and press the Start button.
6. Bake the bread until it is golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
7. Apple butter can be baked directly into the bread for added flavor. For a different taste, consider substituting with your favorite jam or jelly.
